title: Cala (disambiguation)
content:
'''Cala''' might refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Cala]]''', a [[Gender|male]] [[Koorivar]] and an [[operations specialist]] and a part of a [[Berch Teller's rebel cell|rebel cell]] led by [[Berch Teller]].
*'''[[Mon Cala]]''', an [[ocean]]ic [[planet]] located in the [[Mon Calamari system]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]==
===Individuals===
*'''[[Cala Brin]]''', a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who was among the founding members of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]].
*'''[[Cala Wenn]]''', a servant of [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]].
*'''[[Cala Worner]]''', female Human recruiter for the Rebel Alliance during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

===Planets===
*'''[[Cala (planet)|Cala]]''', an [[Atmosphere/Legends|airless]] rock and the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Ilum system/Legends|Ilum system]] in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]].
*'''Mon Cala''', also known as '''[[Dac/Legends|Dac]]''', home planet to the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]], the [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]], the [[Moappa]], the [[Amphi-Hydrus]], and the [[Whaladon/Legends|Whaladons]].

{{Disambig}}
